articles.title: China releases first photo of an asteroid some consider Earth’s ‘quasi moon’ - NBC News
articles.description: China’s Tianwen-2 space probe has beamed back the first photo of an asteroid that some astronomers think might have once been part of the moon. The mission aims to return a sample to Earth.

articles.title: 'What we found was striking': Physicists take the closest-ever look at a black hole's mysterious event horizon - Live Science
